g.text: Postgres DB System Reconcile State Machine
read spec, status, delete intent, and OCI lifecycle
- Managed and name-resolved reconciles currently do not
enter UpdatePostgresDbSystem, so mutable updates are
- Confirm deletion with GetDbSystem until the resource is
- Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
unsupported or immutable drift is detected
wait for the spec or live state to change
owned Secret cleanup fails after OCI delete
retry Secret cleanup until completion is allowed
